recommendations.title: Don't Bother to Knock
recommendations.overview: An airline pilot pursues a live-in babysitter at his hotel and gradually realizes she is not as stable as perhaps she should be.

recommendations.title: Quatermass and the Pit
recommendations.overview: A mysterious artifact unearthed below a London Underground station proves to have powerful psychic effects on the people around.

recommendations.title: Asylum
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatrist applies for a job at a mental asylum and must pass a test by interviewing four patients. He must figure out which of the patients, is in fact, the doctor that he would be replacing if hired.

recommendations.title: Titanic II
recommendations.overview: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a modern luxury liner christened "Titanic 2," follows the path of its namesake. But when a tsunami hurls an ice berg into the new ship's path, the passengers and crew must fight to avoid a similar fate

recommendations.title: The Monster Club

recommendations.title: The Vault of Horror
recommendations.overview: The sequel to Tales from the Crypt.  Five strangers trapped in a basement vault converse about their recurring nightmares. Their stories include vampires, bodily dismemberment, east Indian mysticism, an insurance scam, and an artist who kills by pain

recommendations.title: Titanic

recommendations.title: Scars of Dracula

recommendations.title: The Vampire Lovers
